E

EARTH_DIAMETER - Static variable in class proceduretest.AStarPlugin
 
end - Variable in class proceduretest.Query
 
expand(Path, BranchState<String>) - Method in class proceduretest.RestrictedPathExpander
This method is used by AStar during traversal to get the nodes which are used to traverse further.
ExpanderRestriction - Class in proceduretest
The Class ExpanderRestriction transforms the String representation of one of the restrictions given in the procedure CALL into an restriction object which is used to ensure that this restriction is fulfilled by all Nodes or Relationships which are traversed by aStar.
ExpanderRestriction(String) - Constructor for class proceduretest.ExpanderRestriction
Constructor for the Class ExpanderRestriction.
